description: A reference money-market fund asset referencing short-duration treasury and repo exposure for accounts that prioritize liquid yield. Disclosures focus on portfolio duration, liquidity gates, and settlement cadence.

docs.label: Fund summary
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes portfolio composition, target duration, and cash-management assumptions.

docs.label: Liquidity memo
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes reference liquidity buffers, settlement cadence, and redemption controls.

docs.label: Risk disclosure
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Lists rate, counterparty, and liquidity risks for reference review.
